station_address: No 424/B, Senapati Bapat Marg, Bethany Co-Operative Housing Society, Kapad Bazar, New Dinkar Co Operative Housing Society, Mahim, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400016
text:
I frequent this petrol pump quite often, which is why I was extremely disappointed by the rude and arrogant behaviour of one of your staff members.

Attached is a photograph of the employee who refused to close the fuel lid after filling petrol. When I requested him to do so, he responded arrogantly, stating that it was “not his job” and even went on to say that I could complain to anyone I wanted as he was “not bothered.”

Basic courtesy and customer service go a long way, and such behaviour is completely unacceptable, especially for customers who regularly patronize your outlet. I hope the management takes note of this and ensures that staff are trained to treat customers with respect and professionalism.

station_address: No 424/B, Senapati Bapat Marg, Bethany Co-Operative Housing Society, Kapad Bazar, New Dinkar Co Operative Housing Society, Mahim, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400016
text:
This is the only petrol pump located between Mahim and Matunga. It's open till 11.00 PM from 6:00 AM.

Place consists of Normal Petrol and XP 95 along with Normal Diesel.

Air pressure pump and Nitro pressure is available. In this location.

What they need to improve is staff communication evey time whatever we ask they don't reply we need to ask them properly then only they willing to answer our questions.

station_address: No 424/B, Senapati Bapat Marg, Bethany Co-Operative Housing Society, Kapad Bazar, New Dinkar Co Operative Housing Society, Mahim, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400016
text:
Can’t believe that petrol pumps can cheat their customers in this day and age. Never showed 0 meter reading. Filled up 35 liters of petrol, while the tank capacity is 37 litres .
,when the fuel meter was showing 1/3 full & the tank was not even in reserve. When asked for a bill, gave excuses that the paper roll is over, then after insisting hands over a hand written bill. The intentions of this Petrol pump owner are very evident by his actions. It’s basically to scam the customers to make money extra money. I didn’t know that Indian Oil XTRA stands for scamming customers for extra money. Now looking at the other reviews, I am now 💯 sure this guy is scamming people everyday.

station_address: No 424/B, Senapati Bapat Marg, Bethany Co-Operative Housing Society, Kapad Bazar, New Dinkar Co Operative Housing Society, Mahim, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400016
text: Fraud petrol pump. Be careful. They did not ask to check zero and when i got down to check meter, it showed 900 rs already filled. I am very much sure they did not start at zero as my car range showed less compared to usual. Never fuel up here. And if you do, be very very cautious.

station_address: No 424/B, Senapati Bapat Marg, Bethany Co-Operative Housing Society, Kapad Bazar, New Dinkar Co Operative Housing Society, Mahim, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400016
text: I had a terrible experience at this petrol pump. The employee started filling fuel without asking or showing the meter at zero. He continued directly from the previous vehicle’s amount and then tried to convince me that it’s not possible, as the pump meter supposedly resets every time. However, my eyes were on the meter, and I can confidently say that they cheated. Be cautious when visiting this pump, as the employees seem dishonest.

station_address: No 424/B, Senapati Bapat Marg, Bethany Co-Operative Housing Society, Kapad Bazar, New Dinkar Co Operative Housing Society, Mahim, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400016
text:
SCAM !!
Please check zero before they fill your tank, they would not ask and directly start filling ! By the time you will realise it will be too late.
Since we always get a full tank done we realised that they filled less petrol then what they should have.
Please be alert !
When we complained and asked for the manager they filled more petrol! Without saying anything.
